case_title: GOODMAN LUMBER CO. VS DEBBS, EDDIE V.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,202.76 FILED BY GOODMAN LUMBER CO. AS TO DEFENDANT DEBBS, EDDIE V. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-15-1986 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
SHOULD HAVE BEEN PROCESSED AS RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT AND NOT AS AN OLD CLAIM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOODMAN LUMBER CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEBBS, EDDIE V. $141.96 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $173.96 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
